_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Advise senior management (e.g., CIO) on risk levels and security posture.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.529), RM-A-003 (RM, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.404). Shared vocabulary: [management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [advise, cio, levels, posture, security, senior] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.880, R=0.870). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Advise senior management (e.g., CIO) on risk levels and security posture." and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.529 > STS 0.404 (gap +0.125). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [management, risk]. DCWF-only: [advise, cio, levels, posture, security, senior]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
